item.name: Assign Room Type - Room Not Found

exec: // 1. Skip this logic if we are actively trying to login, register, or refresh
// We don't want an infinite loop!
// 2. Helper function to decode JWT and check expiration safely
if (!token) return true; // No token means it's effectively "expired"
// JWTs have 3 parts separated by dots. The payload is the middle part.
// If the token expires in less than 45 seconds, refresh it!
console.log("Access token is missing or expiring. Initiating auto-refresh...");
// Send background request to your Spring Boot server
// Instantly update the variable so the main request uses the new token!
console.log("Auto-refresh successful! Continuing with original request...");
console.error("Refresh token is dead. You need to log in manually again.");
